title: Ghmrc
description: Configuration file for ghm - Project manager for opensource developers on Github.

root.description: The root directory where all your GitHub repositories are stored. Relative to the config file location.

editor.description: The default editor command to open repositories

shells.description: Shells whose shellrc files should be managed by ghm. At least one shell is required.

$schema.description: The schema URL for this config file.
